seoTitle: Tyagarah vs Tyalgum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tyagarah and Tyalgum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tyagarah and Tyalgum.
heading: Tyagarah vs Tyalgum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tyagarah, New South Wales and Tyalgum, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyalgum has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tyagarah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tyagarah or Tyalgum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tyagarah has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Tyalgum scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tyagarah scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Tyalgum scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tyagarah or Tyalgum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyalgum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
